series_metadata.series_description: Records of drugs purchased, received, or transferred into a facility. This includes but is not limited to issue listings, records of receipts, invoices, etc.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 3 years, then destroy. Daily issue listing for non- controlled drugs may be destroyed after verification against monthly issue listings. ; Electronic: Retain 3 years, then destroy. Daily issue listing for non- controlled drugs may be destroyed after verification against monthly issue listings., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
